2603.16654.title: Omanic: Towards Step-wise Evaluation of Multi-hop Reasoning in Large Language Models
2603.16654.paper_summary: Reasoning-focused large language models (LLMs) have advanced in many NLP tasks, yet their evaluation remains challenging: final answers alone do not expose the intermediate reasoning steps, making it difficult to determine whether a model truly reasons correctly and where failures occur, while existing multi-hop QA benchmarks lack step-level annotations for diagnosing reasoning failures. To address this gap, we propose Omanic, an open-domain multi-hop QA resource that provides decomposed sub-questions and intermediate answers as structural annotations for analyzing reasoning processes. It contains 10,296 machine-generated training examples (OmanicSynth) and 967 expert-reviewed human-annotated evaluation examples (OmanicBench). Systematic evaluations show that state-of-the-art LLMs achieve only 73.11% multiple-choice accuracy on OmanicBench, confirming its high difficulty. Stepwise analysis reveals that CoT's performance hinges on factual completeness, with its gains diminishing under knowledge gaps and errors amplifying in later hops. Additionally, supervised fine-tuning on OmanicSynth brings substantial transfer gains (7.41 average points) across six reasoning and math benchmarks, validating the dataset's quality and further supporting the effectiveness of OmanicSynth as supervision for reasoning-capability transfer. We release the data at https://huggingface.co/datasets/li-lab/Omanic and the code at https://github.com/XiaojieGu/Omanic.
2603.16654.paper_summary_zh: 推理為中心的大型語言模型（LLMs）在許多自然語言處理任務中取得了進展，但其評估仍然具有挑戰性：最終答案本身並未揭示中間推理步驟，這使得難以確定模型是否真正正確推理以及失敗發生的地方，而現有的多跳問答基準缺乏步驟級別的註釋來診斷推理失敗。為了解決這一問題，我們提出了Omanic，一個開放領域的多跳問答資源，提供分解的子問題和中間答案作為結構性註釋，以分析推理過程。它包含10,296個機器生成的訓練範例（OmanicSynth）和967個專家審核的人類註釋評估範例（OmanicBench）。系統評估顯示，最先進的LLMs在OmanicBench上的多選準確率僅為73.11%，確認了其高難度。逐步分析揭示CoT的性能依賴於事實的完整性，隨著知識缺口的存在，其增益減少，錯誤在後續跳躍中放大。此外，對OmanicSynth的監督微調在六個推理和數學基準上帶來了可觀的轉移增益（平均7.41分），驗證了數據集的質量，進一步支持OmanicSynth作為推理能力轉移的監督效果。我們在https://huggingface.co/datasets/li-lab/Omanic發布數據，並在https://github.com/XiaojieGu/Omanic發布代碼。
2603.16654.author: Xiaojie Gu et.al.
2603.16654.authors: Xiaojie Gu, Sherry T. Tong, Aosong Feng, Sophia Simeng Han, Jinghui Lu, Yingjian Chen, Yusuke Iwasawa, Yutaka Matsuo, Chanjun Park, Rex Ying, Irene Li
